produces: renderer.js — composes track state into drawText payloads with marquee overflow branch.

assertion_coverage.evidence: Every onTrack call results in paintAll → host.drawText with payload.{title,artist,marquee}.
composePayload(null) returns { title: 'Not Playing', artist: '', marquee: false }.
composed.length > STATIC_FIT_CHAR_LIMIT toggles marquee:true; long titles → marquee:true.
Uses only host.drawText, host.onWillAppear, host.onWillDisappear, host.log, host.liveContexts and source.subscribe — no WebSocket, no child_process, no fs.
marquee branch driven by composed-string length against STATIC_FIT_CHAR_LIMIT.

rationale: STATIC_FIT_CHAR_LIMIT=28 is a heuristic chosen because the exact Touch Bar pixel resolution is external_source_unreachable (sections-v1.json IP3). 28 char is a conservative point below which typical 'Title — Artist' strings reliably fit even in a wide font. See state/inline-deviations/dev-002.json.
